carefully check what is wrong with the earlier desktop version. it still has the sticky scroll on home screen. services screen on desktop works fine. and i'm able to scroll. 

So in summary: 

Mobile: Home + services work fine
Desktop: Services works fine

Only desktop + Home tab doesn't work fine. PLEASE FIXZ IT YOU GODDAMN WIZARD. YOU CAN DO THIS
